problem.title: Longest Substring that contains 2 unique characters
problem.description: Given a string s, find the length of the longest substring that contains at most two distinct characters.

solutions.title: Solution 1 – Sliding Window
solutions.description: Use a sliding window with a HashMap tracking the frequency of each character inside the window. When the map contains more than two distinct characters, shrink the window from the left by decrementing counts and removing characters that reach zero. This guarantees the window always contains at most two distinct characters, and the maximum window size seen is the answer.
